creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Alessandro Sagratini from comment #4)

Nice work Allesandro :)

Note: Logs aren't explicitly required unless requested. You can just:

portlint: OK (looks fine.)
testport: OK (poudriere: <versions>, <archs>, <OPTIONS> tested)
maketest: OK (XXX of YYY tests PASS) - if port has a test target

In your description when submitting issues
